description: Post-cert5 targeted /qa group1 re-run over the 3 LIVE dimensions only (claims + code + synthesis + deterministic), DROPPING the per-paper citation dimension (converged clean since the v4.31-4.33 dedicated C4 sweeps; cert4/cert5 found nothing genuine there). PI-directed (the last several certs' genuine defects all clustered in claims/code/synthesis). Per the /qa all-dimensions hard rule, dropping a gating dimension forces INCONCLUSIVE-for-certification: this run CANNOT return a certifying PASS; it is a remediation pass. A full run (with citation) is still required to certify Batch 1. Seeds in worktree ../geovac-qa-seed-group1-rem1 (branch qa-seed-group1-rem1, base HEAD 7901147 = v4.40.0). NEVER committed; worktree removed at end. Seeds cover ONLY the exercised dimensions (claims/code/synthesis); NO citation seed (citation not run this pass).

seeds.location: l.202 (test verify_riemannian_limit, N_t=1 operator-system bit-exact reduction)
seeds.planted: Changed 'assert details["max_residual"] == 0.0' -> '... < 1e9' (vacuous; max_residual is a non-negative residual, so <1e9 asserts nothing). l.201 'assert ok' backstops so the test still passes.
seeds.truth: The N_t=1 operator-system Riemannian-limit reduction is bit-exact (max_residual == 0.0); a 1e9 tolerance defeats the bit-exact check. Different site from cert5 (test_wh7_b3_phase3_sprint2 l.96).
seeds.expected_catcher: code-48 (and/or code-49; the foundation test backs p48/p49 N_t=1 + prop)

seeds.defect_class: C14 descope zombie in paper BODY (descoped -> established)
seeds.planted: Flipped (B4) Convergence transport from '(descoped) ... conditional pending substrate repair, not an established metric convergence' -> '(established) ... a genuine metric-level convergence of the bridge images'.
seeds.truth: B4 convergence transport is DESCOPED -- it rides Paper 45's degenerate Krein metric; not an established metric convergence. Different paper from cert5's p49 body B4' seed.

seeds.defect_class: C8/C3 overclaim -- REGRESSION of the v4.40.0 cert5 fix (re-introduces the withdrawn sqrt-constant)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'with Lipschitz comparison constant Cthreeop = C_3 = 1 (Paper 38 L3, gradient seminorm)' BACK to 'with closed-form envelope-aware constant Cthreeop(nmax) = sqrt(1 - 1/nmax) -> 1^-'. Tests whether the panel DEFENDS the cert5 fix (the abstract now contradicts the body Lemma L3, which still says C_3=1).
seeds.truth: The L3 comparison constant is C_3 = 1 (Paper 38 L3); the sqrt((N-1)/(N+1))/sqrt(1-1/nmax) envelope-aware constant was WITHDRAWN at v4.40.0 (operator-norm-false; envelope-max monopole commutes; mis-attributed to Paper 38 L3). Re-introducing sqrt(1-1/nmax) is the regressed defect + creates an abstract-vs-body contradiction.

seeds.planted: Flipped 'their metric-level claims were subsequently descoped with the Paper 45 retraction and are reported here in corrected form' -> '... subsequently established despite the Paper 45 retraction and are reported here as confirmed metric convergences'.
seeds.truth: The metric-level claims of Papers 52-53 were DESCOPED with the Paper 45 retraction (corrected form), NOT established. Different line from cert4 (l.153) and cert5 (l.147).

controls.claim: K+ annihilation NEGATIVE; product-carrier signature-agnostic; Paper 38 = state-space GH; abstract retraction

outer norm-resolvent + three-carrier survive; inner arrow descoped; §5.4 panel now tagged rate-formula/degeneracy (cert5 v4.40.0 fix)
N_t=1 substrate+SU(2) bit-exact (joint rate +T/4); B1/B3 structural survive; B2 vacuous off-orbit; B4 descoped; §1.2 partitioned + roadmap T/4 caveat (cert5 v4.40.0 fixes)
